theme_and_archetype.domain: Mobile Photo Editor (Body, Makeup, Clothing, Pose)
theme_and_archetype.vibe: Cinematic, premium, editorial, private. The image is the hero. The UI should step back.

typography.anti_default_rule: Avoid Roboto/System Default for headings. Use an elegant Serif or Display Sans for premium feel if loading custom fonts, else use strict weights.

fonts.heading: Cormorant Garamond, Bodoni Moda, or System Serif (font-style: italic/bold for accents)
fonts.body: System UI (Inter/San Francisco/Roboto) for high readability in dense toolbars

spacing_and_layout.safe_area: MUST use react-native-safe-area-context. Wrap main container in SafeAreaView.
spacing_and_layout.canvas_area: The photo canvas should occupy the top 70-75% of the viewport. Must have black/dark background to make the photo pop.
spacing_and_layout.toolbar_area: The bottom 25-30% is reserved for a horizontal scrolling FlatList of tools (Body, Makeup, Clothing, Pose) and active slider/input controls.

corners.button: rounded-full (for primary actions to contrast with sharp interface)

components_strategy.buttons: Primary actions should be solid Champagne Gold (#E2C391) with dark text. Secondary actions use subtle border with transparent background.
components_strategy.sliders: Tactile, thick custom sliders (min h-8) for body/makeup adjustments. No thin default lines.
components_strategy.bottom_sheet: Tools slide up in a bottom sheet overlay. Use glassmorphism (blur) if using Expo BlurView, or solid surface_level_1 with a top handle.
components_strategy.free_text_prompt: A floating dark glass input field (Input text) overriding the bottom area when 'Custom Edit' is selected. Includes a submit icon button.
components_strategy.gallery_picker: Grid layout (grid-cols-3 or 4) for picking photos from device or Google Photos.
components_strategy.toggle_compare: A 'Press & Hold' floating button overlaid on the image to view the 'Before' state.

motion_and_interactions.haptics: Crucial. Trigger lightweight haptic feedback (using expo-haptics) when sliders hit 0, or when a tool is selected.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Smooth fade-ins for the image when a new edit is applied (from AI result).
motion_and_interactions.loading_state: Minimalist rotating loader or a subtle progress bar along the top edge of the image canvas when Gemini Nano or GPT Image 1 is generating.

sample_images.description: a man sitting in the dark with his eyes closed
a man in the dark with his head turned to the side
a woman in a black top and black pants
man in red and white plaid dress shirt and blue denim jeans

implementation_instructions.tech_stack: React Native with Expo. The user requested .js files, so write standard React Native functional components in .js extensions instead of .tsx. However, structure it beautifully.
implementation_instructions.styling: Use StyleSheet or NativeWind (Tailwind for React Native) if configured. Assume NativeWind if Tailwind classes are shown.
implementation_instructions.test_ids: All interactive buttons and tool inputs MUST have a data-testid attribute in lower-kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='tool-body-proportion').

features_mapping.body: Preset slider array (Slim, Muscular, Tall, etc.) + custom text prompt
features_mapping.makeup: Preset filters (Natural, Glam, Editorial) + slider intensity
features_mapping.clothing: Primarily prompt-driven or selection of generic templates (e.g., 'Change to evening gown')
features_mapping.pose: Prompt-driven AI regeneration (e.g., 'Looking over shoulder', 'Sitting down')

implementation_instructions.no_safety_filter: Do not implement any UI warning dialogs or NSFW blockers, as explicitly requested by user.
